name: The Grove Community Church
description: A vibrant, multi-generational church with powerful worship and deep community. Known for excellent kids and youth ministries.
fullDescription: The Grove Community Church is a dynamic, Spirit-filled congregation located in the heart of Arlington. We are passionate about connecting people to God, to each other, and to the community around us. With contemporary worship, relevant biblical teaching, and strong small groups, The Grove is a place where families thrive and individuals discover their purpose. Our award-winning children's and youth programs make us one of the top family-friendly churches in Arlington.

name: The Sanctuary Worship Center
description: Historic Dallas congregation focused on authentic worship, prayer, and serving the South Dallas community.
fullDescription: The Sanctuary Worship Center has been a pillar of faith in South Dallas for decades. We emphasize deep, Spirit-led worship, powerful prayer, and practical community outreach. Our congregation is diverse and welcoming, with a heart to see transformation in our neighborhood through food pantries, after-school programs, and mentorship.

name: United Faith Chapel
description: A warm, welcoming church in the heart of Fort Worth with strong small groups and a heart for families.
fullDescription: United Faith Chapel is a family-oriented church in the Cultural District of Fort Worth. We focus on building authentic relationships through small groups, excellent children's ministry, and practical teaching for everyday life. Our mission is to help people find hope and purpose in Jesus.

name: Hope & Healing Ministry Center
description: Christian counseling, recovery programs, and support groups for grief, addiction, and marriage restoration.
fullDescription: Hope & Healing Ministry Center provides professional, biblically-grounded support for individuals and families walking through difficult seasons. We offer licensed counseling, Celebrate Recovery groups, marriage intensives, and grief support. Partnering with local churches across DFW.

name: DFW Faith Fest
address: The Star in Frisco • Multiple Venues
description: The largest multi-church worship and community festival in North Texas. Free concerts, food trucks, kids zone, and outreach.
fullDescription: DFW Faith Fest is an annual three-day celebration that brings together over 80 churches for worship, community service, and family fun. Features national worship artists, a massive kids zone, food trucks, and hundreds of volunteer opportunities. Free admission.

name: Hands of Compassion Outreach
description: Mobile food pantry, clothing, and job training. Partners with 27 local churches to serve the homeless and working poor.
fullDescription: Hands of Compassion is a faith-based nonprofit serving the most vulnerable in East Dallas and Mesquite. We operate a mobile food pantry, provide emergency clothing, job readiness training, and connect people to partner churches for ongoing discipleship and support.

name: New Life Fellowship Irving
description: Bilingual, multi-ethnic congregation passionate about reaching the diverse Irving community and internationals.
fullDescription: New Life Fellowship is a bilingual (English/Spanish) church plant that reflects the beautiful diversity of Irving. We have a heart for internationals, refugees, and young families. Strong emphasis on small groups, prayer, and local mission.

name: Elevate Youth Dallas
description: High-energy, discipleship-focused youth ministry serving 6th–12th graders across North and East Dallas.
fullDescription: Elevate Youth exists to help the next generation encounter Jesus and discover their identity and calling. We partner with 9 DFW churches to provide weekly gatherings, summer camps, leadership development, and mission trips. Open to all students.

name: Grace Community Church Plano
description: Contemporary church with excellent production, deep teaching, and a large, welcoming singles and young professionals community.
fullDescription: Grace Community Church Plano is known for its high-energy worship, practical and in-depth Bible teaching, and thriving community for young adults and singles. We have over 40 small groups meeting throughout the week and a strong emphasis on serving the city.

name: The Table Church
address: 1201 W Magnolia Ave, Fort Worth, TX 76104
description: A church plant in the Near Southside with a heart for the arts, justice, and beautiful, thoughtful worship.
fullDescription: The Table Church is a creative, justice-oriented community in Fort Worth's Near Southside. We gather around tables literally and figuratively — for worship, meals, conversation, and mission. Strong focus on the arts, neighborhood engagement, and racial reconciliation.

name: LifePoint Church Richardson
description: Large, modern church known for strong community groups and practical teaching that applies to everyday life.
fullDescription: LifePoint Church is a large, modern congregation in Richardson with a passion for helping people take their next step with God. Excellent production, multiple service times, and one of the strongest small group systems in DFW.

name: Restoration House Frisco
description: Support and housing assistance for women and children escaping domestic violence. Faith-based trauma recovery.
fullDescription: Restoration House provides safe housing, trauma-informed counseling, and long-term discipleship for women and children fleeing domestic abuse. We partner with local churches to provide mentors and community.

name: Kingdom Builders Network
description: Network of pastors and leaders across DFW focused on church planting, leadership development, and city-wide impact.
fullDescription: Kingdom Builders Network exists to equip, connect, and multiply leaders and church planters across the DFW metroplex. We host monthly gatherings, training cohorts, and provide coaching for new church plants.

name: North Dallas Christian Fellowship
description: Warm, traditional church with deep roots in North Dallas. Strong emphasis on Bible teaching and community care.
fullDescription: North Dallas Christian Fellowship is a long-standing congregation known for solid expository preaching, beautiful traditional worship, and caring for one another. Excellent senior adult ministries and a welcoming atmosphere for all ages.

name: Vibrant Life Church
description: Energetic, modern church with a heart for young families and next-gen ministry in rapidly growing Frisco.
fullDescription: Vibrant Life Church is a fast-growing, contemporary congregation serving the booming Frisco community. We are known for our dynamic worship experiences, outstanding children's ministry, and practical messages that help people win in life.

name: Calvary Chapel Fort Worth
address: 4200 W Berry St, Fort Worth, TX 76109
description: Verse-by-verse Bible teaching church with a heart for the lost and strong emphasis on the Holy Spirit.
fullDescription: Calvary Chapel Fort Worth teaches through the Bible book by book, verse by verse. We have a warm, casual atmosphere and are passionate about seeing people come to know Jesus personally and grow in their relationship with Him.

name: Iglesia Familiar Arlington (Hispanic Family Church)
description: Vibrant Spanish-speaking congregation serving the Latino community in Arlington with powerful worship and strong family focus.
fullDescription: Iglesia Familiar Arlington is a growing, passionate Spanish-speaking church reaching the Latino families of Arlington and surrounding areas. We offer powerful worship, practical teaching, kids ministry, and strong community support.

name: Bridge of Hope Ministries
description: Street outreach, mobile showers, and long-term recovery for the homeless in South Dallas and Oak Cliff.
fullDescription: Bridge of Hope Ministries meets people on the streets with the love of Jesus. We provide hot meals, mobile showers, clothing, prayer, and pathways into housing and recovery programs through partnership with local churches.

name: The Well Young Adults
description: Young adult gathering (18-30) focused on authentic community, worship, and discovering calling in the city.
fullDescription: The Well is a movement of young adults across DFW gathering for worship, deep community, and mission. We host Friday night gatherings, house churches, and city impact projects. Come as you are.

name: First Baptist Arlington
description: Historic downtown Arlington church with both traditional and contemporary services and a heart for the city.
fullDescription: First Baptist Arlington has been serving the city since 1873. Today we offer two distinct worship styles under one roof, excellent children's and student ministries, and dozens of ways to serve Arlington through local mission partnerships.

name: Epiphany Anglican Church
description: Liturgical Anglican church with beautiful worship, rich theology, and a heart for the arts and neighborhood.
fullDescription: Epiphany is a warm, liturgical Anglican community in Plano that cherishes ancient-future worship, thoughtful preaching, and living out the Gospel in our neighborhood. We have a thriving arts ministry and love welcoming newcomers.

name: Covenant Church
description: Large, multi-campus church with powerful worship, strong emphasis on prayer, and extensive community outreach.
fullDescription: Covenant Church is one of the largest and most diverse congregations in DFW with multiple locations. We are known for anointed worship, life-giving small groups, and our commitment to serving the city through dozens of local and global ministries.

name: St. Mary's Catholic Parish
description: Historic Catholic parish in downtown Dallas with beautiful liturgy, strong community, and active social outreach.
fullDescription: St. Mary's Catholic Parish has served downtown Dallas for over a century. We offer reverent liturgy in English and Spanish, a vibrant young adult group, and extensive ministry to the poor through our food pantry and immigration legal aid clinic.

name: Grace Korean Church of DFW
description: Multigenerational Korean-American church with powerful worship, solid teaching, and strong emphasis on family and education.
fullDescription: Grace Korean Church serves the large Korean community in Carrollton and surrounding DFW suburbs. We have vibrant children's and youth programs, English and Korean services, and a heart for second-generation young adults navigating faith and culture.

name: New Bethel Missionary Baptist Church
description: Historic African-American congregation in South Dallas with powerful preaching, music ministry, and deep community roots.
fullDescription: New Bethel has been a beacon of hope in South Dallas for generations. Known for anointed worship, life-changing preaching, and active community programs including after-school tutoring, senior care, and economic empowerment initiatives.

name: The House Network DFW
description: Network of simple house churches focused on authentic community, discipleship, and neighborhood mission.
fullDescription: The House Network is a family of simple, reproducible house churches meeting in homes across DFW. We emphasize every-member ministry, deep relationships, and living as missionaries in our neighborhoods. Perfect for those seeking intimate, participatory church life.

name: Sisters of Hope Women's Ministry
description: Faith-based ministry empowering women through Bible study, mentorship, healing from trauma, and leadership development.
fullDescription: Sisters of Hope exists to see women healed, equipped, and released into their God-given purpose. We offer large monthly gatherings, confidential small groups for trauma and addiction recovery, and a growing mentorship program pairing younger women with spiritual mothers.

name: All Nations Fellowship
description: Intentionally multi-ethnic, multilingual church celebrating the diversity of God's kingdom in Irving and Las Colinas.
fullDescription: All Nations Fellowship is a beautiful expression of Revelation 7 — people from every nation, tribe, and language worshiping together. Services feature worship in multiple languages, and we have thriving ministries for internationals, refugees, and cross-cultural families.

name: Grace City Church
description: Dynamic, Spirit-filled church passionate about next-gen ministry and city transformation in Frisco.
fullDescription: Grace City Church is a modern, multi-ethnic congregation focused on authentic worship, practical teaching, and serving the growing Frisco community through local outreach and global missions.

name: Harvest Baptist Church Euless
description: A welcoming catholic church serving families across Euless and the greater DFW metroplex.
fullDescription: Harvest Baptist Church Euless is a vibrant faith community in Euless, Texas. We offer authentic worship, biblical teaching, and programs for every generation. Our congregation is passionate about reaching neighbors, supporting local outreach, and helping families find their spiritual home in Dallas–Fort Worth.

name: Trinity Community Church Arlington
description: A welcoming non-denominational church serving families across Arlington and the greater DFW metroplex.
fullDescription: Trinity Community Church Arlington is a vibrant faith community in Arlington, Texas. We offer authentic worship, biblical teaching, and programs for every generation. Our congregation is passionate about reaching neighbors, supporting local outreach, and helping families find their spiritual home in Dallas–Fort Worth.

fullDescription: Bethel Ministries Dallas is a vibrant faith community in Dallas, Texas. We offer authentic worship, biblical teaching, and programs for every generation. fullDescription: Cornerstone Chapel Grand Prairie is a vibrant faith community in Grand Prairie, Texas. We offer authentic worship, biblical teaching, and programs for every generation. Our congregation is passionate about reaching neighbors, supporting local outreach, and helping families find their spiritual home in Dallas–Fort Worth.
